steps.title: Use sine
steps.content: In a right triangle, sine is the opposite side divided by the hypotenuse. The side opposite angle $x$ is $63$, and the hypotenuse is $73$.

steps.title: Write the ratio
steps.content:
Substitute the opposite side and hypotenuse into the sine ratio.
$$\sin x^\circ=\frac{63}{73}$$
The answer is C.
